note: Intended-design diagrams from phase ①; they hold as-built for Stage A (the command pipeline + validated hand-offs). Stage B (orchestrator chaining on result.json/pipeline.json) is not yet drawn.

diagrams.title: Command pipeline: typed artifacts through validate-in/out, looping on issues
